ham: Your bank has generated a 6-digit OTP for your recent transaction. Please use it within 5 minutes. Do **not** share this code with anyone.
spam: Hey, apke courier ko miss kar diya gaya. 24 ghante ke andar <URL> pe click karke delivery confirm kare. Agar aapne confirm nahi kiya toh package return ho jayega. 1Rs discount is waqt aapke liye! Urgent, jaldi kare.
